title: SSJU Time Table 2025 @ ssju.ac.in

detail.title: SSJU Time Table 2025 @ ssju.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of SSJU have released the SSJU Time Table 2025 for B.Voc. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: SSJU Time Table 2025 is out as the Soban Singh Jeena University has released the B.Voc and students can access their SSJU Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here for further updates on SSJU candidates can follow this page.

sections.heading: How to Download the SSJU Time Table 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Soban Singh Jeena University Time Table 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Time Table for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.
